d833742c-c79a-4193-be9c-f902c57f99b9.thoughts:
I don't want anyone to know how I feel.
What if it happens again and I over-react?
There's a high likelihood of it happening.
d833742c-c79a-4193-be9c-f902c57f99b9.feelings:
I feel like it's happening again.
I feel disgusted that it's a possibility.
d833742c-c79a-4193-be9c-f902c57f99b9.comments: I'm on the train to Fulda. I've brought work with me which is working as an excellent distraction, but every now and then, I look out the window and I'm reminded that it's a real thing that happened.

29673b04-a22a-402a-9a3b-57a1cb4d3829.thoughts:
I'm glad the train ride is over and I don't have to think about it anymore
I don't want to talk about it with people
I don't want people to notice I'm down
I want to be alone
29673b04-a22a-402a-9a3b-57a1cb4d3829.feelings:
Exhausted with all the worrying.
Alienated from others.
I'm scared to talk to people in case they notice that I'm down.
29673b04-a22a-402a-9a3b-57a1cb4d3829.triggers: The end of the train ride
29673b04-a22a-402a-9a3b-57a1cb4d3829.comments: We've finally made it to Mackenzell after taking the train. The journey was long, but I had fun building this app. I really don't want to think about what happened anymore.
